name: S-Force Chase
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ－Ｆｏｒｃｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セキュリティ・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> チェイス
desc: Target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "S-Force" monsters you control with different names; return them to the hand. If a "S-Force" monster you control would banish a card(s) from your hand to activate its effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "S-Force Chase" once per turn.
eff: Target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "S-Force" monsters you control with different names; return them to the hand. If a "S-Force" monster you control would banish a card(s) from your hand to activate its effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "S-Force Chase" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
